CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.Name = 'SaaS', IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Closed"), ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Canceled") ), SaaS_Onboarding_Eligible_Date_Stamp__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(SaaS_Onboarding_Eligible_Date_Stamp__c)), SaaS_Onboarding_Eligible_Date_Stamp__c, Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Onboarding_Eligible_Date__c ) ), NULL )
CustomField.label: SaaS Onboarding Eligible Date
